{"action":"opened","issue":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55837","repository_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia","labels_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55837/labels{/name}","comments_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55837/comments","events_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55837/events","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/55837","id":2540600559,"node_id":"I_kwDOABkWpM6Xbnzv","number":55837,"title":"Should the docstring for `div` clarify floating-point behaviour as in `fld`?","user":{"login":"Sagnac","id":83491030,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgzNDkxMDMw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/83491030?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac","html_url":"https://github.com/Sagnac","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"labels":[],"state":"open","locked":false,"assignee":null,"assignees":[],"milestone":null,"comments":0,"created_at":"2024-09-22T02:12:00Z","updated_at":"2024-09-22T02:12:00Z","closed_at":null,"author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","active_lock_reason":null,"body":"At least until `div` is fixed for floats (#49561).

At the moment the docstrings for [`div`](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/911e02558d0c145a192facd28808b68e157aa5af/base/div.jl#L6-L11) refer only to integers, but there's no type restriction on the inputs which leads to a discrepancy if called with floats:

```julia
julia> div(1.0, 0.1, RoundToZero)
9.0

julia> round(1.0 / 0.1, RoundToZero)
10.0
```

This is of course because decimals such as 0.1 don't have an exact floating-point representation so the result can differ when rounded down; the docstring for [`fld`](https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/blob/911e02558d0c145a192facd28808b68e157aa5af/base/div.jl#L125-L139) includes this warning, but `div` does not, so even simple operations such as `1.0 ÷ 0.1` can lead to unintuitive results if this is not specified.

https://github.com/MakieOrg/Makie.jl/issues/2941 here:

After updating to Julia 1.9, the following is shown in the REPL after `]up GLMakie`:

```
Precompiling project...
  Progress [>                                        ]  0/1
  ◒ GLMakie
```

After a bit, CPU usage hovers around 0%. CairoMakie precompiles fine. GLMakie precompiles fine on 1.8.5. 

Attempted reinstalling GLMakie, restarting Julia, rebooting computer, using juliaup. Using a 64-bit system.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/49743/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"timeline_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/49743/timeline","performed_via_github_app":null,"state_reason":null},"comment":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/1567889139","html_url":"https://github.com/JuliaLang/julia/issues/49743#issuecomment-1567889139","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/49743","id":1567889139,"node_id":"IC_kwDOABkWpM5ddBbz","user":{"login":"Sagnac","id":83491030,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjgzNDkxMDMw","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/83491030?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac","html_url":"https://github.com/Sagnac","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/Sagnac/received_events","type":"User","site_admin":false},"created_at":"2023-05-30T07:12:46Z","updated_at":"2023-05-30T07:12:46Z","author_association":"CONTRIBUTOR","body":"I experienced the same issue and can also confirm that disabling the precompile workload solved it.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/JuliaLang/julia/issues/comments/1567889139/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
